segments.text: They have greatly oppressed me from my youth,
they have greatly oppressed me from my youth, but they have not gained the victory over me.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: Plowmen have plowed my back and made their furrows long.
he has cut me free from the cords of the wicked.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: May all who hate Zion be turned back in shame.
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: May they be like grass on the roof, which withers before it can grow;
segments.speaker: Israel

segments.text: a reaper cannot fill his hands with it, nor one who gathers fill his arms.
May those who pass by not say to them, "The blessing of the Lord be on you; we bless you in the name of the Lord."
segments.speaker: Israel
